# AccessibilityDeclarationCreateRequest.Data

**Object**

The data structure of the request body you use to create an accessibility declaration.

## Declaration

```swift
object AccessibilityDeclarationCreateRequest.Data
```

## Dictionaries

- **AccessibilityDeclarationCreateRequest.Data.Attributes**: Attributes you set that describe the new accessibility declaration resource.
- **AccessibilityDeclarationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships**: The relationships you include in the request and those on which you can operate.
